creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm getting a segmentation fault when I start io.elementary.calendar 5.1.1 on FreeBSD 13.0-ALPHA1 #3 main-c255947-g420d4be3e40a (amd64):

```
$ io.elementary.calendar

** (io.elementary.calendar:52405): WARNING **: 15:24:32.229: EventStore.vala:313: Unknown value of _NL_TIME_WEEK_1STDAY: 168276142
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
```

I've not tried to debug so far, I'm just reporting an issue.
